_comment2: GODL1KE MCP Server Config — Copy to ~/.claude.json
_comment4: WHY: MCP servers extend Claude Code with external tools. These four
_comment5: servers are loaded globally for every project. Context7 gives version-
_comment6: specific library docs, Sequential Thinking helps complex reasoning,
_comment7: Linear connects to your LXS task board, and Obsidian reads your vault.
_comment9: IMPORTANT: Remove all _comment fields before using. JSON doesn't support comments.
_comment10: Also merge with any existing ~/.claude.json content (e.g., onboarding state).

context7._note: Version-specific library documentation. Ask 'use context7 to find FastAPI docs' in a session.

sequential-thinking._note: Complex multi-step reasoning. Activates automatically for hard problems.

linear._note: LXS Consulting task management. Requires OAuth setup: claude mcp add --transport http linear https://mcp.linear.app/mcp
